summary: Tested Communication Center inbox features. Backend: 16/16 tests PASS. Frontend: All inbox features working - select mode, bulk actions (Mark Read/Unread/Archive - NO Delete), filter sheet (Status/Type/Pet), archive view toggle, TCK ID visible on all rows, swipe actions. Ticket thread page shows messages correctly with 'Reopen Ticket' button for resolved tickets.

integration_issues.issue: Some older notification ticket IDs (TKT-SHOP-*) return 404 when clicking - ticket may not exist in mira_tickets or service_desk collections

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationsInbox.jsx correctly implements iOS Mail-style inbox with all required features
Bulk action bar correctly shows only Mark Read, Mark Unread, Archive buttons - NO Delete button as specified
Archive view correctly switches Archive button to Unarchive button
InboxRow.jsx always shows TCK ID line for trackability as required
TicketThread.jsx correctly shows 'Reopen Ticket' button for resolved tickets
All bulk endpoints (bulk/read, bulk/unread, bulk/archive, bulk/unarchive) working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core features working, minor ticket navigation issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Communication Center inbox fully implemented. Select mode shows 'X selected' header with bulk action bar (Mark Read, Mark Unread, Archive - no Delete). Archive view shows 'Unarchive' instead of 'Archive'. Filter sheet has Status, Type, Pet filters. Ticket thread page at /tickets/:ticketId shows messages with Reopen button for resolved tickets. TCK ID line visible on all inbox rows.
